labResults.loadError: Your lab results could not be loaded right now.
labResults.emptyBody: When your doctor orders lab work, results will appear here once processed.
labResults.trendsEmptyBody: As your lab history grows we will chart changes over time automatically. Ask the AI assistant to compare recent results.
labResults.trendsSubtitle: Tracking your key lab values over time
labResults.trendsKeyInsightsTitle: 💡 Key Insights from Your Lab Trends
labResults.trendsInsightDiabetesBody: Your HbA1c has dropped 0.6 points in 6 months. At this rate you could reach your 6.5% target by June 2026. Metformin + diet changes are working.
labResults.trendsInsightVitDBody: Your Vitamin D went from 18 to 22 ng/mL — improving, but still insufficient. Daily Vitamin D 2000IU should raise this above 30 by June.
labResults.trendsInsightCholBody: All cholesterol values are in the healthy range. Your Atorvastatin medication is working well — keep taking it consistently at bedtime.
labResults.upcomingEmptyBody: Tests your care team has ordered but not yet completed will show up here so you can book collection.
labResults.reportsEmptyBody: Once tests are resulted, every single test and value will appear here for reference.
labResults.medicationNote: 💊 Your {{medication}} medication is keeping these levels healthy.
labResults.historySubtitle: Complete record of all laboratory visits
labResults.upcomingSummaryBillNote: 💳 Insurance will be billed directly at the lab
labResults.upcomingFastingBody: {{count}} of your tests require fasting. Book a morning appointment and stop eating from 10 PM the night before.
labResults.upcomingFastingStopEating: ☐ Stop eating by: 10:00 PM the night before
labResults.upcomingFastingDrink: ☐ You CAN drink: plain water, no sugar/milk
labResults.upcomingFastingArrive: ☐ Arrive at lab: Morning (8:00–9:00 AM recommended)
labResults.upcomingPreferredTime: Preferred Time (Morning recommended for fasting tests)
labResults.upcomingFastingReminder: 🍽️ Fasting Reminder: Stop eating by 10 PM tonight

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Fine-tune notifications, language, privacy, and connected services from one place.

settings.shareDoctorsBody: Allow linked clinicians to see your clinical records for care.
settings.sharePharmacyBody: Allow pharmacy teams to access prescription fulfillment details.
settings.shareInsuranceBody: Allow insurer workflows to use needed claim and eligibility data.
settings.emailNotificationsBody: Receive appointment, document, and message updates by email.
settings.smsNotificationsBody: Receive urgent care reminders and appointment updates by SMS.
settings.pushNotificationsBody: Receive in-app notifications in the CeenAiX portal.
settings.largeTextBody: Prefer larger text on patient portal screens.
settings.highContrastBody: Prefer higher contrast UI treatments where available.
settings.securityBody: Authentication is managed by Supabase Auth. Password, MFA, and session controls will appear here as the account security workflow deepens.
settings.supportBody: For now, use Messages to contact your care team. A dedicated support inbox can be connected later.

imaging.title: Imaging & scans
imaging.subtitle: A central place to see your radiology studies, AI-assisted impressions, and comparisons.
imaging.featureViewerBody: Stream MRI, CT, X-ray, and ultrasound studies with pan, zoom, and series navigation.
imaging.featureAiReadingBody: Plain-language impressions and highlighted findings alongside the radiologist report.
imaging.featureShareBody: Grant time-boxed access to a new doctor for a second opinion.
imaging.loadError: Imaging data could not be loaded right now.
imaging.emptyBody: Radiology studies will appear here when imaging-style lab order items are available.
imaging.viewerPlaceholder: Image pixels/DICOM viewer will connect when imaging storage is available.
imaging.noScheduledBody: Upcoming radiology orders will appear here when your doctor orders them.
imaging.dataNote: Imaging is data-bound to radiology-style lab order items. A dedicated imaging study/DICOM model is still needed for images, series, accession metadata, and radiologist report PDFs.

insurance.title: My Insurance
insurance.subtitle: Coverage · Claims · Benefits
insurance.featureCoverageBody: See policy, network, deductibles, and what is covered this year.
insurance.featureClaimsBody: Real-time claim status and member liability once payments integration is live.
insurance.featureEligibilityBody: Check coverage before booking with any clinic or laboratory.
insurance.loadError: Insurance data could not be loaded right now.
insurance.benefitSpecialistsNote: Mapped from your active insurance plan; exact specialty coverage depends on insurer rules.
insurance.benefitLabsNote: Lab activity is read from CeenAiX lab orders and estimated against your plan co-pay.
insurance.benefitPharmacyNote: Prescription activity is read from doctor-issued prescriptions; exact formulary pricing needs pharmacy claims integration.
insurance.benefitTelehealthNote: Virtual appointment estimates use the same plan co-pay until insurer eligibility APIs are connected.
insurance.benefitPreventiveNote: Preventive services are shown as a plan-level benefit until insurer benefit categories are synced.
insurance.benefitPhysioNote: Coverage usually requires a clinical referral or prior approval.
insurance.preauthBody: CeenAiX does not have a dedicated pre-authorization table yet. These rules are displayed from plan coverage and will become real approvals when the insurer workflow is connected.
insurance.exclusionsBody: Cosmetic services, non-formulary medications, and out-of-network care may require insurer approval or may not be covered. Confirm with the insurer before booking high-cost services.
insurance.docCardUploaded: Card image is linked to your patient insurance record.
insurance.docCardMissing: No card image is stored yet.
insurance.dataNote: Insurance plan data is live from patient_insurance and insurance_plans. Claim rows are estimated from appointments, lab orders, and prescriptions until the claims/pre-authorization tables are connected.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Secure storage for lab reports, imaging, prescriptions, insurance cards, and referrals.
documents.featureVaultBody: All your clinical and administrative PDFs in one encrypted place, tagged and searchable.
documents.featureSharingBody: Grant a new clinician temporary access to specific documents without giving up ownership.
documents.featureOcrBody: Plain-language summaries and detected findings for uploaded clinical documents.
documents.noDocsBody: Documents generated from labs, prescriptions, and insurance will appear here.
documents.dataNote: The vault is data-bound to lab orders, prescriptions, and patient insurance. A dedicated document metadata table is still needed for uploaded PDFs, signed URLs, and sharing permissions.

stub.comingBody: This directory experience is being connected to verified UAE healthcare data.

guestAiChat.assistantLead: Get instant health guidance powered by medical knowledge. For appointments and records,
guestAiChat.inputPlaceholder: Ask me anything about your health...
guestAiChat.keyboardHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
guestAiChat.disclaimer: This AI assistant provides general health information only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.
guestAiChat.welcomeMessage:
Hello! I'm your AI health assistant powered by advanced medical knowledge. I can help you:

• Understand symptoms and health concerns
• Get guidance on when to see a doctor
• Find the right specialist for your needs
• Answer general health questions
• Provide wellness tips

What can I help you with today?
guestAiChat.doctorBannerBody: This is the public health assistant. For your schedule, patients, and prescriptions, use your doctor portal.

dashboard.title: Admin dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: The super-admin cockpit will surface platform health, approvals, insurance, and AI analytics once Phase 3 activates.
dashboard.featureHealthBody: Realtime uptime, error budgets, and regional performance.
dashboard.featureApprovalsBody: Doctor onboarding queue with license and credential checks.
dashboard.featureInsightsBody: Usage, satisfaction, and outcomes across the patient and doctor portals.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.subtitle: DOH, DHA, and MOH compliance reporting once audit exports are activated.
compliance.featureAuditBody: Immutable audit trail for every PHI access.
compliance.featureReportsBody: Pre-built DOH/DHA packages with exportable evidence.
compliance.featureIncidentsBody: Track privacy incidents and remediation workflow.

systemHealth.title: System health
systemHealth.subtitle: Live observability into Supabase, edge functions, and third-party integrations.
systemHealth.featureServicesBody: Health of database, auth, storage, and edge functions.
systemHealth.featureLatencyBody: Regional latency histograms and P95/P99 alerts.
systemHealth.featureIntegrationsBody: DOH, DHA, insurance, and payments reachability.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.subtitle: Hospital and clinic tenancy management for the platform.
organizations.featureTenantsBody: Provision clinics, assign super-users, and configure branding.
organizations.featureAgreementsBody: BAA and contracting status per organization.
organizations.featureBillingBody: Seat consumption, consult volume, and invoice status.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Global user directory with role, status, and onboarding progress.
users.featureDirectoryBody: Search by role, organization, and onboarding status.
users.featureRolesBody: Assign or revoke doctor, nurse, pharmacy, lab, and admin roles.
users.featureImpersonationBody: Audit-logged support impersonation with automatic revert.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Diagnostic tooling for platform operators and SREs.
diagnostics.featureJobsBody: Queue health for AI workers, reminders, and report generation.
diagnostics.featureLogsBody: Centralised search across frontend, edge functions, and database logs.
diagnostics.featureFeatureFlagsBody: Toggle MVP, Phase 2, and Phase 3 features per environment.

aiAnalytics.title: AI analytics
aiAnalytics.subtitle: Model usage, safety signals, and outcome metrics for every AI surface.
aiAnalytics.featureUsageBody: Sessions per model, feature, and region.
aiAnalytics.featureSafetyBody: Flagged outputs, user reports, and incident trends.
aiAnalytics.featureOutcomesBody: Correlation between AI guidance and clinician decisions.

dashboard.title: Laboratory dashboard

dashboard.featureResultsBody: Structured entry with reference ranges and auto-flagging.

referrals.featurePatientBody: Check fasting, prior results, and pre-collection notes.
referrals.featureSlaBody: Track turn-around time commitments per test panel.

resultEntry.title: Result entry
resultEntry.subtitle: Enter verified results with double-entry validation and reference ranges.
resultEntry.featureStructuredBody: Units, reference ranges, and validation per test code.
resultEntry.featureFlagBody: Automatic flagging with override-with-reason audit trail.
resultEntry.featureSignBody: Technician and pathologist review before release.

radiology.title: Radiology workspace
radiology.subtitle: DICOM review, reporting, and peer-review for MRI, CT, X-ray, and ultrasound.
radiology.featureReportsBody: Structured report templates with peer-review handoff.

dashboard.title: Pharmacy dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Dispensing, inventory, and insurance claims for pharmacy operators.
dashboard.featureQueueBody: Pending prescriptions from clinicians across your network.
dashboard.featureInventoryBody: Stock levels, near-expiry alerts, and auto-reorder.
dashboard.featureClaimsBody: Insurance claim submission and member liability.
dashboard.queueEmpty: Nothing in the queue right now.
dashboard.stockAllGood: All critical SKUs are well stocked.

dispensing.title: Prescription dispensing
dispensing.subtitle: Process approved prescriptions with verification, counseling, and handover.
dispensing.featureVerifyBody: Allergy, interaction, and duplicate therapy checks.
dispensing.featureCounselBody: Structured counseling prompts per drug class.
dispensing.featureHandoverBody: OTP-signed handover to the patient or a trusted delegate.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Live inventory with batch, expiry, and procurement workflow.
inventory.featureLotsBody: Expiry, lot numbers, and recall-ready traceability.
inventory.featureStockBody: Demand forecasting informed by prescribing trends.

portal.title: Insurance portal
portal.subtitle: Insurance operator workspace for plans, eligibility, and claims oversight.
portal.featureEligibilityBody: Expose realtime eligibility to partner clinics.
portal.featureClaimsBody: Auto-adjudication, fraud flags, and escalation queue.
